properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 87/24
 1.ISPS SECURITY INFOMATION NORWEGIAN PORTS
 FROM 110930 UTC JULY 24 MARITIME SECURITY LEVEL IS SETT FROM LEVEL 2 TO LEVEL 1 IN FOLLOWING PORT:
 NOSLA-0002. NORSEA TANANGER

 FOLLOWING NORWEGIAN PORT FACILLITIES ARE STILL AT ISPS SECURITY LEVEL 2
 NOSSJ-0007. HELGELAND BASE
 NOTAE-0002. CONOCO PHILLIPS BASE TANANGER

 SHIPS CALLING AT THESE FACILLITIES SHALL RESPOND WITHOUT DELAY TO THIS CHANGE IN SCURITY LEVEL.
 2.CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 70/24
